title: borago pygmaea
intro: Borago pygmaea, also known as pygmy borage or dwarf borage, is a small annual herb species of the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Borago pygmaea include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for soothing irritated skin, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Borago pygmaea can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal blends to enhance its medicinal effects.
